case_title: DAYSIA YAZMYN PHIM ET AL VS. SAMANTHA NOEL CHRISTIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,675.00 FILED BY PHIM, DAYSIA YAZMYN SOLIS, KRISTIN CAMILLE M. AS TO DEFENDANT CHRISTIE, SAMANTHA NOEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2022 -- TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS DAYSIA YAZMYN PHIM AND KRISTIN CAMILLE M. SOLIS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAMANTHA NOEL CHRISTIE IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-15-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED. PARTIES STATE THAT THAY ARE OPEN TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION TO ALLOW THE COURT TO PREPARE A STATEMENT OF DECISION AND TO DETERMINE AN APPROPRIATE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

PROGRESS REPORTS WILL BE SCHEDULED EVERY THREE MONTHS THROUGH THE LAST PAYMENT DATE OF JANUARY 15, 2023. APPEARANCES ARE NOT REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE BY THE NEXT COURT DATE. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-20-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DAYSIA YAZMIN PHAM IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KRISTIN SOLIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAMANTHA NOEL CHRISTIE IS PRESENT. AMENDED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THE BALANCE OWED TO THE PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTS SIX MONTHS OF DEFENDANT'S SHARE OF RENT FROM NOVEMBER 2019 TO APRIL 2020 ($5,770.02) PLUS MAY 2020 PRORATED RENT ($744.52) AND NOVEMBER 2019 PARKING ($150.00). DEFENDANT IS GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO PAY $6,769.54 OVER A 12 MONTH PERIOD. FIRST PAYMENT WAS MADE IN COURT BY ZELLE IN THE AMOUNT OF $565.00. TEN MORE PAYMENTS TO FOLLOW IN THE AMOUNT OF $565.00, LAST PAYMENT SHALL BE IN THE AMOUNT OF $554.54. TOTAL AMOUNT OF $6,769.54. PAYMENTS DUE ON THE 15TH OF THE MONTH. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AND JUDGEMENT WILL BE ENTERED. . (SEE ATTACHED) NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
